title: Glass Chopping Board 50x40 cm: Tempered Glass Worktop Savers for Kitchens, Durable, Scratch-Resistant, Heat-Proof - Floral Design
features: BREAK AND SCRATCH RESISTANT: Crafted from tempered glass, this cutting board is exceptionally durable, break-resistant, and stain-resistant, ensuring long-lasting use while protecting your countertops from scratches.

HEAT RESISTANT WORKTOP SAVER: Leave this glass chopping board out as a convenient and stylish space saver. Its heat-resistant surface shields your counter from hot pots, condensation, and scratches, making it an ideal addition to any kitchen.
EASY MAINTENANCE: Enjoy hassle-free cleanup with this easy-to-wipe glass chopping board. Its smooth surface ensures trouble-free maintenance, keeping your kitchen effortlessly clean.

PERFECT GIFT: Ideal for cooking enthusiasts, this glass chopping board makes a thoughtful gift for family and friends. Perfect for special occasions like Mother's Day, Father's Day, and Valentine's Day, it adds a touch of elegance to any kitchen.

WHAT’S INCLUDED: Each package comes complete with an instruction manual and an extra silicone feet, providing added convenience and value. This versatile glass worktop saver is the perfect blend of style and functionality.
description: Product Description 50 x 40 cm WHITE NATURAL DESIGN GLASS CHOPPING BOARD / WORKTOP SAVER Our glass chopping boards are a healthy option because of their scratch-free surface. Glass won't produce bacteria inside scratched areas. It won't hold odors. They are heat resistant so you can use them as a teapot or hot pan holder too. You can also use these glass chopping boards as a worktop saver. Hygienic and decorative Printed in white with florals. It also has a smooth surface. Rounded and polished edges. It is a great match with any colour of your worktop or table. Non-slip real silicone feet Silicone feet on the bottom will hold the glass chopping board in place when cutting, ensuring it will not slide around. It even comes with a spare silicone foot and an instruction manual. 5mm thick tempered glass Easy to clean, scratch-free surface Heat Resistant - Feel free to put your freshly cooked meals directly onto your table on this worktop saver. DETAILS OF OUR 50x40cm WHITE NATURAL DESIGN GLASS CHOPPING BOARD / WORKTOP SAVER BREAK RESISTANT : this cutting board is crafted from tempered glass, which is durable, break-resistant, stain-resistant, and won't absorb odors. HEAT RESISTANT SURFACE : as a space saver, leave this glass chopping board out all the time as it will protect the counter and other surfaces from heat, condensation, and scratches EASY TO CLEAN : Easy to wipe glass chopping board, easy cleanup and trouble-free maintenance. GREAT GIFT : This glass chopping board is a good gift for your family members or friends who love cooking. Great gift on Mother's Day, Father's Day, Valentine's Day EXTRA : Package contains instructions manual and an extra silicone foot just in case! Advantages of Glass Chopping Board / Glass Worktop Protector - WHITE NATURAL DESIGN 50X40CM Strength and Safety of a Tempered Glass Chopping Board - WHITE NATURAL DESIGN Stronger than normal (non-tempered) Stronger than heat-treated glass Breaks into small pebbles instead of large shards Perfect for thermal resistance and impacts How is our TEMPERED GLASS CHOPPING BOARD different from others? Tempered glass can also withstand high temperature changes of up to 250c. Tempering the glass does not change any of the visual qualities of the glass such as solar radiance and light transmission. Tempered glass is considered safety glass and is very difficult to break. If the glass is broken, it shatters into pebbles reducing the risk of serious injury. Lastly, tempered glass cannot be cut, etched or carved, polished, or altered once it is tempered. While the tempered glass cutting board is durable and break-resistant, please note the following to avoid damage: Avoid Scratching: Ceramic knives can scratch glass surfaces! The combination of high hardness, sharpness, and nature of ceramic knives makes them particularly prone to scratching glass surfaces, whereas softer and more ductile metal knives tend to be more forgiving. To prevent damage to glass cutting boards, it is advisable not to use ceramic knives. Metal knives won't scratch glass chopping boards. FAQs FAQ 1: Can I use this glass chopping board with hot pots and pans? Yes! This glass chopping board is crafted from heat-resistant tempered glass, able to handle temperatures up to 250°C. Place hot pots, pans, or freshly cooked meals on this worktop saver without worrying about damage to your countertops—perfect for busy kitchens that need both functionality and style. FAQ 2: How durable is this glass chopping board compared to regular glass? Our tempered glass chopping board is designed for impact resistance and strength. Unlike regular glass, tempered glass shatters into small, safe pebbles if broken, minimizing the risk of injury. This worktop saver is not only durable but also a reliable choice for daily food prep in any kitchen. FAQ 3: Is the glass chopping board easy to clean and maintain? Yes, cleaning this glass chopping board is incredibly easy! Its smooth, scratch-free surface means a quick wipe-down is all you need, keeping your workspace hygienic. Unlike wood or plastic boards, this worktop saver won’t hold onto stains or odors, making it a hassle-free addition to your kitchen. FAQ 4: Will metal or ceramic knives scratch this glass chopping board? While this glass chopping board is scratch-resistant, we recommend avoiding ceramic knives, as they can scratch the surface. Metal knives, however, work perfectly and will not damage this worktop saver . For the best experience, stick with traditional knives to keep your board looking new. FAQ 5: Can I use this glass chopping board to prepare raw meat and other ingredients? Yes, this glass chopping board is perfect for all food prep, including raw meat. Its non-porous, scratch-resistant surface prevents bacteria build-up, unlike wood or plastic boards. This worktop saver offers a hygienic, easy-to-clean workspace for any ingredient.
